tipRules.tip: KVD: Even in slick calm clear conditions, a jerkbait over the top of them will draw fish from distance. 'They're going to see it and they're going to come.' Don't switch to finesse just because it's calm.

knowledge.insight: KVD: In clear water slick calm conditions, most anglers reach for finesse. KVD's instinct is to jerk a jerkbait over the top of them — the clear water means they'll see it from a distance. Confidence in the technique matters as much as conditions.
